message:
test(e2e): Add unit test for log scan secret detection

Add scan_log_report_flags_secret test to verify that scan_log_jsonl
correctly identifies and reports API keys in log content:

- Creates input with OpenAI-style API key pattern
- Verifies error_count is 1 (secrets are errors, not warnings)
- Verifies rule_id matches "OPENAI_API_KEY" detection rule
- Verifies context_redacted contains "<redacted>" replacement

This test ensures the log scanning functionality correctly identifies
high-severity secrets and generates appropriate findings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
